title: Eval Calibration: Extend to 60-80 Samples + Run
description: Extend eval dataset from 43 to 60-80 samples with focus on semantic/coarse types. Run eval with evidence gate enabled (threshold=0.0) to capture score distributions.
acceptance_criteria: New samples include 15-20 semantic rephrasings and 10-15 coarse summaries
Eval run captures post-rerank Citation.score per sample (not Qdrant raw)
Score distribution report generated per query type (exact/fine/semantic/coarse)
Results include threshold candidate analysis (conservative_95, balanced, aggressive)
Eval run references bundle_id from frozen bundle
implementation_steps: 1. Design new eval samples: semantic rephrasings, coarse summaries, anti-patterns
3. Enhance run_retrieval_eval.py to capture post-rerank Citation.score
4. Add score distribution reporting per query type
